_comment: Manual listings — entries the backend parser (../price_analyzer/parse_v4.py) missed or misread. Merged into the pipeline by export_data.py and scripts/rebuild_dashboard_data.py. Same schema as public/data/listings.json (the output format). Every entry MUST carry a `source` field starting with 'manual:' so it's traceable. Add new entries at the top. Remove entries when the parser starts indexing them correctly. Cross-posts (same dealer, same price, same ref in multiple groups) should be ONE entry here — the dedupe step collapses them anyway, but keeping them consolidated at the source reduces noise.

group: RWB Lounge / Timepieces Galore / SELL-Bay-OVER 10k / MDA RWB
notes: Same US dealer cross-posted in 4 WhatsApp groups. Price is '26K + 350 to complete' = $26,350 (card/fee surcharge). Parser was blind to this dealer entirely — no entry in sellers.json for +1 305 at all.
